user_query: We’re doing a performance pass on our messaging app database. Please read input/schema.md and input/query_requirements.md and produce: (1) output/queries.sql.txt with the requested SQL statements, and (2) output/indexes.sql.txt with the CREATE INDEX statements you recommend. Add brief rationale notes to output/notes.md. Make sure your SQL uses PostgreSQL-native patterns that match the requirements (e.g., DISTINCT ON, IS NOT DISTINCT FROM, SELECT FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED, expression/partial/covering indexes).
